name.en-US: Little Office of S. Liborius, Bishop, Great Miracle Worker, and Special Patron against Kidney Stones

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of S. Liborius, Bishop, Great Miracle Worker, and Special Patron against Kidney Stones, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US: From Epitome Historica de Vita, Reliquiis, et Beneficiis Admirabilibus S. Liborii, Episcopi (1736).
